CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-10-2024 Continued To Jul-17-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion For Order Appointing Receiver And Issuing A Preliminary Injunction; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Jan-25-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK's Motion For Order Appointing Receiver And Issuing A Preliminary Injunction.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Matter is transferred to be heard on the same date in department 501 at 9:30 a.m. That department handles all real-property related matters per SF Local Rule 8.10A1.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)

PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR ORDER APPOINTING RECEIVER AND ISSUING A PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION
Off Calendar Jan-25-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearance

Adam Vukovic Esq., BRYAN CAVE LEIGHTON PAISNER LLP, 949-223-7000; via zoom for plaintiff
No other appearances

Mr. Vukovic does not contest to the tentative. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR ORDER APPOINTING RECEIVER AND ISSUING A PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION is OFF CALENDAR. This motion was filed and served on January 5, 2024 and notice for January 25, 2024. Notice of motion references CRC 3.1150 requiring noticed motion under CCP 1005 or an OSC. The Court records do not reflect any appearance by the defendant.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Vanessa Wu; Not Reported. (D501)
